mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SEMI_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_PWD FROM SEMI_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT P.PRODUCT_NAME , H.CREATE_DATE , I.PRICE FROM HISTORY_MILEAGE H JOIN PRODUCT P ON P.PRODUCT_NO = H.PRODUCT_NO JOIN INVENTORY I ON P.PRODUCT_NO = I.PRODUCT_NO WHERE H.USER_ID = #{username} OFFSET #{pageInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageInfo.size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT USER_NAME , USER_ID , EMAIL , CREATE_DATE , ROLE , STATUS FROM SEMI_USER OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
